positive: A maximalist, stylized forest scene centered around a glowing, abstract crescent moon. The flora should be highly detailed and fantastical, composed of bioluminescent mushrooms, curled jungle vines, and oversized, stylized leaves in jewel tones (deep teal, emerald green, sapphire blue). The composition should be dense and symmetrical, featuring clean silhouettes and strong contrast between dark forest canopy and luminous magical elements. Use a highly detailed linework style reminiscent of nature engravings and Art Nouveau poster art, rendered with vibrant digital watercolor washes and sharp, graphic outlines. Centered composition, flat graphic design print, perfect for textile printing. --ar 1:1 --v 5.1
negative: blur, lowres, grainy, watermark, signature, logo, text, words, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, noise, messy, solid color, grayscale
